originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__irq_3' during its initialization is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'irq' during its initialization is never read
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN () Bool
  true)
reasoning: irq = *ops at L12 is a genuine dead store — irq is never read after initialization in irq_domain_add. L12 is marked // (4) ERROR, confirming this is a VBDB-known bug location (primary known bug is null deref of *ops when ops=NULL; dead store co-occurs). PC = (!TWL4030_CORE AND IRQ_DOMAIN) OR TWL4030_CORE simplifies to IRQ_DOMAIN (TWL4030_CORE implies CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN via derived macro at L3-5). Correctly constrained — bug fires whenever irq_domain_add is compiled (IRQ_DOMAIN=T). No library macros.
